strengths: Demonstrated proper traction setup and maintained good visualization throughout the cutting process
Successfully initiated entry cuts and followed the circle path for most of the procedure
Showed consistent instrument control during the circle following phase
weaknesses: Failed to complete the circle within the 300-second time limit
Cutting speed was insufficient to finish the task despite proper technique
May have spent excessive time on precision at the expense of efficiency

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, focusing on steady cutting speed rather than perfect precision.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the circle within the time limit

drills.name: Timed circle completion drill
drills.description: Practice complete circle cuts with a 2-minute target, gradually reducing time while maintaining quality.
drills.targets_weakness: Cutting speed was insufficient to finish the task

drills.name: Efficiency over perfection practice
drills.description: Perform circle cuts prioritizing completion speed while maintaining acceptable quality standards.
drills.targets_weakness: May have spent excessive time on precision at the expense of efficiency

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on balancing precision with speed to consistently complete tasks within time limits. Your technique is sound, but efficiency needs improvement to achieve passing scores.
